name: atlas-workflow-orchestrator
description: Orquestra pipelines Atlas no Codex via sub-agents: PRD, entrevista, plan handoff, execucao, validator e review.

interface.longDescription: Porta o Atlas Workflow Orchestrator para Codex como skill: o orquestrador decide fases e despacha sub-agents bloqueantes para PRD, entrevista, codex-plan-handoff, codex-plan-execute, codex-task-validator e codex-slice-review opcional.
defaultPrompt: workflow codex interview-only brainstorm nova ideia
